name: BBX Capital, Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview History BBX Capital, Inc. (referred to together with its subsidiaries as the Company, we, us, or our, and without its subsidiaries as BBX Capital) is a Florida-based diversified holding company whose principal holdings are The Altman Companies, LLC (Altman), which was formerly known as BBX Capital Real Estate, LLC (BBX Capital Real Estate or BBXRE), BBX Sweet Holdings, LLC (BBX Sweet Holdings or BBXSH), and Renin Holdings, LLC (Renin).
